top_signals.title: UK gets a new prime minister as Trump slams Britain as 'Poverty Stricken Disaster'
top_signals.summary: The prospect of Burnham, considered more left-leaning than Starmer, replacing the incumbent prime minister sent jitters through bond markets earlier this year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin ‘vibe-codes’ anonymous billboard demo with onchain moderation on Aztec
top_signals.summary: Vitalik Buterin "vibe-coded" an anonymous billboard demo on Aztec with onchain moderation, a censor role, and a local LLM flagging daemon.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: FIFA emerges as the $9 billion winner as the biggest, brashest World Cup ever draws to a close
top_signals.summary: The football governing body presided over the most lucrative sporting event in history and is poised to net over $9 billion in revenue for 2026.
